source: Curated from 100 MP3D A/B/C candidates generated with Matterport3DSimulator skyboxes.
selection_basis: Automated novelty/quality ranking followed by visual review for C-only semantic evidence.
usage: Show only View A, View B, and question_for_model. Hide View C and hidden_oracle_answer until evaluation.

candidate_question_templates: After moving to the hidden viewpoint C, what newly visible object or area is in front of the camera?
Which scene region becomes visible in View C that is not visible in Views A and B?
If an agent starts at Views A/B and moves to C, what is the most salient change in the view?
records.intended_use: A/B are shown to the model; C is hidden oracle evidence for review or answer derivation.
records.question_for_model: Only View A and View B are visible. Imagine taking one short navigation step to the hidden nearby viewpoint C. What new visual evidence, object, or area would likely become visible there that is not sufficiently visible in A/B?
records.hidden_oracle_answer: The hidden view reveals an outdoor terrace or balcony with a dining table and chairs among trees.
records.evaluation_note: Show only View A, View B, and question_for_model to the model. Keep View C and hidden_oracle_answer hidden until evaluation.
